text:
Gemini 3 Pro was the first model to achieve at least 23% on ARC-AGI-2, which it did in November, 2025 (it actually scored 31%).

So the 8-12 month gap between closed and open weights models still seems to hold. But they are also more jagged, better at some tasks, worse at others.

RT @rileybrown: yup.. Someone made a Figma for AI Agents

Claude Code and OpenClaw can now create designs 10x easier...

00:00 Intro
00:46…

Mirendil Co-Founder and CEO Behnam Neyshabur explains the path to self-accelerating AI:

" When you think about what does a scientist or an engineer do, the main skill they have is get very deep in a domain... and build a very sharp expertise that accumulates over time."

"As you https://t.co/v6bILvxFHE

Started working on our “Gallery of the Future” zine. 
You’ll all get a digital copy. 
Then I print as many as I can afford and send them to you via post snail mail 🐌 ✉️ 💌😁

I see a lot of you are still co-creating. I expended the deadline to Wednesday midnight. Already started working on zine design. I will keep an eye not to miss anyone. Make sure to write your handle and credit your work on the board, please.
RT @bneyshabur: Today, I’m excited to formally announce @MirendilAI with my amazing co-founders Harsh Mehta, Shayan Salehian, and Tara Reza…
Quake of course is one of the supreme achievements in the history of technology. (And everything is hard!)

RT @levelsio: The craziest thing about Quake is how many modern FPS games originate from it somehow

Valve's Source engine was a modified Q…
RT @romero: I’m proud of Quake. We all are. Quake changed games forever. That said...
It’s time to accelerate science and technology!
